side_effects.description: Injection site burning immediately after first injection
Left arm completely numb and tingling the day after first injection, persistent tingling in both arms with sensitivity to numbness and tingling with any activity
Muscles hurting, back hurting, feels like pulled muscles in legs
Appetite went away after first injection, forcing self to eat
Felt confident and strong from testosterone initially, but after peptide injections confidence went away and now just feels like existing

protocol_notes: User was concurrently on 200mg/week testosterone cycle (week 7 of 10). Injected 0.5mL of CJC-1295 with DAC and 0.3mL of Ipamorelin on Sept 10th, then one more injection. Reconstituted with 2mL of bacteriostatic water containing 0.9% benzyl alcohol. User later discovered they had miscalculated doses and actually injected ~2.5mg CJC-1295 and ~1.5mg Ipamorelin per injection (significantly overdosed). User attributed symptoms to dosing error, not the compounds themselves. Did not continue peptides pending better understanding.
